subject: feat(menu): add focus trap, Home/End keys, disabled items, extract useDisclosureFocus
body:
- Extracted useDisclosureFocus hook — reusable open/close focus cycle
- Wired useFocusTrap into burger menu — Tab trapped within dropdown
- Added Home/End keys alongside ArrowDown/ArrowUp
- Added disabled item support — grayed-out, skipped by keyboard nav

Tags: feature, a11y, refactor, ui

Impact: user-facing
